text:
Do what you must, do what you cannot do. 
Do anything that will get you through the dark

Life is a lot like a sewer: 
We get out of it what we put in

When you don't know where you're going, 
any road will take you there

Sometimes it seems we're just spinning our wheels and then suddenly... 
we move

I had shoes to fill. 
Walking barefoot now.
Just looking out on the day of another dream
And if you fall collect your soul and start again

Into the ear of every anarchist 
that sleeps but doesn't dream 
we must sing, we must sing, we must sing
But I can't seem to keep my head out of the clouds

song: Roll me through the gates of hell
text: When you offer pink or blue, I'll take the blackest

The ember of freedom will not bloom
 if we do not plant any seeds
